programme.title: Days of Jesse James
programme.desc: A bank robbery pulled off by the bank officials not the usual James gang

programme.title: The Mystery of the Hooded Horsemen
programme.desc: In a small frontier mining town a gang of outlaws in black hoods is running roughshod over locals presiding over a reign of terror Tex Tex Ritter and Stubby Horace Murphy take up the dying wish of Tom Lafe McKee a kindly rancher killed by the gang to capture the marauders Knowing that the survival of the local mine and the heart of Toms sweet daughter Iris Meredith are on the line Tex and Stubby go undercover in the gang hoping to bring them down from the inside

programme.title: Round up Time in Texas
programme.desc: Gene and Frog arrive with a herd of horses for Genes brother a diamond prospector whose work has attracted the interest of a bunch of bad guys

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Adventures of Young Indiana Jones Spring Break Adventure
programme.desc: Its 1916 and Indiana Jones is living with his dad in Princeton New Jersey Spring break is fast approaching and all Indy can think of is taking his girlfriend Nancy daughter of cliffhanger author Edward Stratemeyer to the prom in a slick new Bugati The cars foreign engine is impossible to get parts for but a favor from a professor working at Thomas Edisons laboratory raises his hopes His plans are sidetracked when a mysterious break-in the theft of an electric motor and rumors of German spies result in a mystery that only Indy and Nancy can unravel Indy and his father then head to the southwest to visit family in Albuquerque With his mischievous cousin Frank Indy heads to Columbus New Mexico to sew some wild oats when the town is suddenly attacked by Pancho Villa and his riders Playing hero Indy follows the Villistas into the desert and is soon taken captive As a 16-year old itching for a good fight Indy is stirred by Villas words and joins his cause riding with the Villistas as General Pershing chases them throughout the desert Indy meets and befriends the Belgian expatriate Remy witnesses the intensity of a young George S Patton and also finds a murderer who escaped the law eight years earlier in Cairo in this adventure that sets the teenage Indy on a path that will lead him to war-torn Europe

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Power of the Space Knights

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Prodigal Boxer 2
programme.desc: Prodigal Boxer 2

programme.title: Shaolin Super Dragon
programme.desc: Shaolin Super Dragon

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A scientist whos working on establishing contact with alien life finds his project in jeopardy when his loan shark comes to call Meanwhile another scientist is researching the communicative skills of an intelligent chimp but her arrogant boss seems to have more of an interest in torturing the animal than performing legitimate experiments

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: After the death penalty is abolished an executioner continues his former job through freelancing

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A greedy woman makes the mistake of murdering her husband while an escaped mental patient dressed in a Santa Claus outfit is on the loose

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: Vicious and ruthless killer Ron and his antsy wimp partner Jimmy Lee Stoler are a couple of escaped convicts on the lam from the law The dangerous duo break into a model home in search of a safe only to discover a family residing in said swanky abode

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Puritanical small town mayor Jake Purly is running for reelection on a strict platform that vehemently opposes sex and pornography However a dark secret from Purlys shady past threatens to resurface and destroy his credibility in the form of lovely escort Dr Rita de Roy

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric confronts the werewolf Nicholas Remy and discovers that he is more formidable an opponent than Skorzeny ever was

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric comes to the aid of a blind woman with a talent for trick shooting he meets while working at a carnival when he learns that her fiancé plans on killing her for the insurance money

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Forever Knight

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A witch fights to gain a powerful occult symbol using a helpless Ryan in the process

programme.title: Theater of Blood
programme.desc: A Shakespearean actor takes poetic revenge on the critics who denied him recognition

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Sergeant Carter takes a temporary desk job writing training manuals and considers making it permanent when he sees the platoon does fine without him; so Gomer messes things up to bring the Sergeant back

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The hungry castaways find a wild duck on the island but they dont know whether to use it as food or attach a message to him and hope for rescue

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligans Christmas wish appears to be coming true when a radio broadcast tells them their rescue is imminent While they wait they recall the first days on the island when Gilligan lost the radio and transmitter

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa gets into an egg feud with a rival egg salesman He makes money but the rest of the family suffers when Hassie wants to date the rivals son

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and Luke need a new gun for a shooting contest Kate needs a new dress to be inducted into the PTA Theres just enough money in the cookie jar for one of them

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: A country singer accidentally swallows an olive with a transmitter in it and Max must protect her from KAOS

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS has developed another robot that goes up against Hymie

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Pamela Gerard escapes from a mental institution and hitches a ride with BJ and the Bear

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed volunteers to be shot into outer space

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Through Rogers trickery Ed believes that he has a shameful heritage so he runs away from home

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: The aristocratic Colonel Klink fails a routine physical exam and lands a combat assignment at the Russian front! Fearing a hard-line replacement at Stalag 13 the men must do all they can to rescind Klinks marching papers

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogans plan to relieve the bombing pressure on London with a trap hinges on Carters ability to remember the name of a town - Leadingham

programme.title: Mchale 302
programme.desc: Mchale 302

programme.title: Mchale 229
programme.desc: Mchale 229

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer helps a recruit smuggle his girlfriend into the barracks

programme.title: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren
programme.desc: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren

programme.title: The Millionairess
programme.desc: A millionairess and a doctor cannot marry until they meet conditions set up by their respective parents

programme.title: Morning Departure
programme.desc: Trouble arises when 12 men realize that only eight of them can escape from the sinking submarine that has collided with a mine left over from the war

programme.title: Miracle of the White Stallions
programme.desc: In 1945 the fate of Viennas famous Lipizzaner stallions hangs into balance American general Patton could save them but first he asks to see them perform

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Hughie Hogg returns with his eye on the office of Hazzard County Sheriff He blackmails his Uncle Boss into supporting his campaign by threatening to take secretly taken photographs of his criminal activities to the FBI Coy and Vance decide to support incumbent Rosco while they collect enough evidence to derail Hughies campaign and run him out of town

programme.title: Hercules 213
programme.desc: Hercules 213

programme.title: Earth The Final Conflict
programme.desc: Boone tries to find out who murdered his wife

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: When a severe heat wave strikes the aliens cut off the citys water supply and exploit a local reverend to drive humans into worshipping the Morthren Eternal

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Trapped in a cave with Alec and facing death by suffocation Arcane reviews his life in a grand soliloquy He can lie to others but ultimately can he lie to himself

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: 40 years ago a plane carrying valuable Egyptian antiquities and a mummy crashed in the swamp Arcane supports an expedition to find it but his interest is far more than financial

programme.title: Space1999
programme.desc: Space1999

programme.title: Wavelength
programme.desc: Two young lovers learn that a small group of child-like space aliens are marooned on Earth and are being held prisoner at a top secret military facility The couple then decide to liberate the extraterrestrial castaways and help them make a rendezvous with a rescue ship sent from the alien home planet

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: After Cheyenne takes a cattle herd to Mexico he is captured by the French After escaping he aids a young runaway princess who doesnt like her much older intended husband He takes her to a rebel camp where they learn her real identity

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Cody is asked to join a group of traveling actors unknowingly taking part in a plot to assassinate a US general

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Det Keller goes undercover as an ex-con musician to bust a crooked parole officer and his ring of parolees

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Cinnamon does her job all too well when the latest mission requires her to feign love for a vain assassin Meanwhile Briggs and Barney work to get an over-the-hill terrorist out of the way

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A military test is conducted in the remote desert and headquartered in the resort where Kimble is working He learns of the top-secret operation and this knowledge puts him in great danger

programme.title: BIg Valley
programme.desc: Nick and Heath on the trail of a gang of murderous raiders stealing horses in the Valley enlist the help of the ex-sheriff of Stockton The motivation behind his help proves interesting and totally unexpected-especially to the Barkleys

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: A fortune in diamonds awaits anyone who gets to it first Murder and arson are just some of the ways of keeping some from succeeding A stranger follows Cheyenne and the treasure hunting party but is he all they have to worry about

programme.title: Chopping Mall
programme.desc: A group of young shopping mall employees stay behind for a late night party in one of the stores When the mall goes on lock-down before they can get out the robot security system malfunctions and goes on a killing spree

programme.title: Cheerleader Camp

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
programme.desc: Hopefully on the verge of curing his Hulk condition Banner meets his colleague Don Blake who is mystically linked to a Viking warrior Thor

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Saw Boss enlists the aid of the Life Eater to be rid of Jayce but the job must be done by the Life Eaters conditions he causes his subjects to face their worst fears and if they weaken even for a moment their life force is trapped forever

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The Lightning League visits a planet which harbours the greatest computer ever built hoping its terminals hold information on Audrics whereabouts The computer Logos keeps switching Audric back and forth between helping and fighting Jayce

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: During Glorias first Indy 500 race all electronic devices suddenly come to a stop thanks to a powerful EMP device VENOM is projecting from a blimp Their next target the International Safe Corporation

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: The Golden Antlers of Artemis said to be able to lead the owner to gold are stolen from a monetary in Greece MASK lays a trap for VENOM to get the antlers back

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: When the lost city of Kongoland arises after 1000 years the N-Team goes to investigate When they arrive an ancient treasure possesses Princess Lana with the spirit of Konga the leader of the Konkas

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Count Gruemon steals Kevins Power Pad and Zapper in Hyrule Kevin and Link head out to the world of Puss n Boots to retrieve the stolen items

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters Sir John a seemingly fearless knight But hes really a coward his village is ready to exile him unless he performs one brave deed Venger captures Sir Johns son and tells him to lead the group into a trap
